Top it all off with a festive ribbon of your choice, and voilà—your holiday masterpiece is complete! All while enjoying delicious homemade cakes and sipping on warm, comforting drinks. Yum!

menu_items.name: 22 SAN ROCCO ROSSO DE TAVOLA NV
menu_items.description: Vivacious and youthful! a Ruby red colour with pronounced notes of cherry and a fresh vinosity. Well rounded and velvety on the palate - delicious.

menu_items.name: 23 RYE MILL SHIRAZ
menu_items.description: A very appealing wine which is rich and youthful with deep and concentrated spicy Shiraz flavours.

menu_items.name: 24 SOL DEL ORO MERLOT
menu_items.description: Lot's of ripe fruit with hints of spicy plums and blackcurrrants that combine to provide an easy drinking wine.

menu_items.name: 25 RIBSHACK RED PINOTAGE- SHIRAZ
menu_items.description: A unique blend of Pinotage and Shiraz grapes combine to provide a rich powerful wine with ripe fruits and a velvety smooth finish. A great experience!

menu_items.name: 26 KAWEL MALBEC UCO VALLEY
menu_items.description: This Malbec has an intense red-violet colour which comes from our vineyards in La Consulta, Uco Valley. Its aroma is deep and displays fresh fruits, especially plums; combined with spices. In the mouth, it has a pleasant taste turning it into an ideal wine to be drunk regularly.

menu_items.name: 27 LOS GANSOS CONO SUR PINOT NOIR
menu_items.description: Aromas of berries, black cherries, sweet fruits, mixed in with hints of toasty oak.

menu_items.name: 28 FLEURIE DOMAINE DE LA TREILLE
menu_items.description: $100 %$ Gamay Noir from 70 year old vines. A delicious feminine wine with strawberry and raspberry aromas complemented by a touch of spice. A pleasant, sweet and rounded finish.

menu_items.name: 29 MARQUES DE ULIA RIOJA RESERVA
menu_items.description: Traditional in style with developed fruit and spice character, mixed with soft tannins. Aged in oak for a minimum of 18 months.

menu_items.name: 30 ANAKENA ONA CABERNET-CARMENERE- SYRAH
menu_items.description: With a deep and beautiful violet colour, this wine represents a great combination of Cabernet Sauvignon, Carmenere and Syrah. The nose presents fresh plum and dark chocolate notes, both integrated with spicy aromas. Round tannins and a wonderful background of barrel ageing, ending with a persistent and complex finish.

menu_items.name: 31 CHÂTEAUNEUF DU PAPE REMY FERBRAS
menu_items.description: A hearty, warming, full bodied wine packed with flavours of spice, cedar wood, tobacco and liquorice.

menu_items.name: 1 PROSECCO LE CLIVIE
menu_items.description: Vibrant and elegant aromas lead to an enjoyable aperitif with a fine mousse.

menu_items.name: 3 CHAMPAGNE GRUET BRUT
menu_items.description: A subtle style of champagne, crisp and lively with a seductive palate. A perfect balance of citrus fruit aromas and brioche.

menu_items.name: 4 MOET et CHANDON BRUT IMPERIAL
menu_items.description: A light, fresh, vigorously youthful Champagne with a fine elegant, slightly lemony nose, lively mousse and long, crisp palate.

menu_items.name: 5 MUMM CORDON ROUGE BRUT
menu_items.description: Freshness bursts onto the palate, followed by great length in the mouth, and subtle, rich bubbles.

menu_items.name: 6 LAURENT PERRIER BRUT
menu_items.description: Medium bodied and very easy on the palate. Perfectly balanced: a soft mouthfeel belies the strong structure of the wine. Finishes clean yet delicately lingers.

menu_items.name: 7 BOLLINGER SPECIAL CUVÉE BRUT
menu_items.description: Bone dry, full bodied wine with the classic, biscuity finesse.

menu_items.name: 12 SAN ZENO BIANCO DA TAVOLA NV
menu_items.description: With a fruity aromas on the nose; dry and fresh, soft and pleasant on the palate.

menu_items.name: 13 SOL DEL ORO SAUVIGNON BLANC
menu_items.description: A fresh Sauvignon with a zingy appealing style combined with soft herbaceous fruits and a dry balanced finish.

menu_items.name: 2 RABOSO ROSATO SPUMANTE BORGO COL ALTO DOC
menu_items.description: A fresh Sauvignon with a zingy appealing style combined with soft herbaceous fruits and a dry balanced finish.

menu_items.name: 14 PINOT GRIGIO CARDONE
menu_items.description: Succulent and fruity with a hint of lemon and an elegant dry finish.

menu_items.name: 16 FRANSCHHOEK CELLAR UNOAKED CHARDONNAY
menu_items.description: This unwooded Chardonnay shows a complex of citrus & tropical fruit on the nose, with a rich & creamy finish on the palate.

menu_items.name: 17 MUSCADET SEVRE ET MAINE 'LES ROCHES NOIR
menu_items.description: Delicate flavours of apple and citrus fruits, the wine is left on its lees, during which time the wine acquires some complexity. Ideal seafood food wine.

menu_items.name: 18 GAVI TENIMENTI CA' BIANCA DOCG 2012
menu_items.description: A lovely biscuity, appley nose and an almost apple-crumble palate gives out generous fruit overlaid with a yeasty toastiness. Great complexity and a pleasing depth.

menu_items.name: 19 SOUTHERN LIGHTS MARBOROUGH SAUVIGNON BLANC
menu_items.description: This wine displays a burst of tropical fruits - guava, passion fruit, and a hint of ripe melon, complimented by a vibrant acidity and typical herbaceous notes. Great texture and length.

menu_items.name: 8 VEUVE CLICQUOT YELLOW LABEL BRUT
menu_items.description: Pale salmon in colour, with precise, crisp aromas of strawberries, redcurrants, raspberries and black cherries. It has fine bubbles with persistent mousse, and prominent flavours of soft red berry fruit, with a well defined wild cherry aspect.

menu_items.name: 9 LAURENT PERRIER ROSÉ BRUT
menu_items.description: This fruity rose is deliciously delicate and pale pink in colour. Crisp and refreshing flavours of soft red fruits are complemented by subtle floral aromas.

menu_items.name: 1 CHABLIS 1er CRU 'VAUCOUPIN' DOMAINE DU COLOMBIER
menu_items.description: From one of the largest premier cru vineyards in Chablis, consistently producing richer wine than is typical of the region.

menu_items.name: 10 BUFFALO RIDGE ZINFANDEL ROSE
menu_items.description: Refreshing and easy drinking with a slight sweetness and hint of ripe red fruits.
